heading: Upload your documents
guidanceText: You should only upload documents that are relevant to the claim.
beforeUploadText: Before you upload the document, give it a name that tells the court what it is, for example ‘witness statement’, or ‘tenancy agreement’.
fileTypesText: You can upload the following file types: DOC/DOCX (Word), XLS/XLSM (Excel), PPT/PPTX (PowerPoint), PDF, RTF, TXT, CSV, JPG/JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF/TIFF.
